zh.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill是John de Knovil和Alice Wallis的女兒，於大約1299年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈爾波頓。她於大約1327年與John Dunn在英國結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾可洛萬斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill是John de Knovil和Alice Wallis的女儿，于大约1299年出生在英国英格兰戴文哈爾波頓。她于大约1327年与John Dunn在英国结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年在英国英格兰可瓦爾可洛萬斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elinor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill was born about 1299, in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John de Knovil and Alice Wallis. She married John Dunn about 1327, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1368, in Clowance, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill est née environ 1299, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John de Knovil et Alice Wallis. Elle a épousé John Dunn environ 1327, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1368, à Clowance, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill wurde um 1299 in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von John de Knovil und Alice Wallis geboren. Sie hat um 1327 in England John Dunn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1368 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Clowance, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill è nata il circa 1299 nel Halberton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di John de Knovil e Alice Wallis. Lei sposato John Dunn circa 1327, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1368, nel Clowance, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovillは約1299年にイギリスイギリスデボンハルバートンでJohn de KnovilとAlice Wallisの娘として生まれた。約1327年にイギリスでJohn Dunnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルクロワンスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill(은)는 대략 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 할버턴에서 John de Knovil(와)과 Alice Wallis의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 영국에서 John Dunn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 클로아스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de John de Knovil e Alice Wallis. Ela casou-se com John Dunn aproximadamente 1327, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1368, em Clowance, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill родилась около 1299 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали John de Knovil и Alice Wallis. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dunn около 1327 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1368 г. в местности клоуанс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elinor de Knovill nació aproximadamente 1299, en Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de John de Knovil y Alice Wallis. Se casó con John Dunn aproximadamente 1327, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1368, en Clowance, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
